acceptance_criteria: Exactly two selected BattleSnake condition commands remain frozen.
Provider credentials are available non-interactively before any paid command starts.
Provider calls stay at or below 16 and provider spend at or below $10.00.
No excluded pair, GPU use, Sentinel resource mutation, or unsupported benchmark/model claim occurs.

evidence.notes: Preflight records that ADC and impersonation were not ready, so no provider command ran.
Execution plan keeps the two exact iter54 commands frozen and unexecuted.
Review records the credential blocker and claim boundary.

falsifiers: The result must block if provider credentials are insufficient before execution.
The result must fail if a provider command runs after failed credential preflight.
The result must fail if provider calls, spend, GPU use, Sentinel mutation, or overclaim occurs outside the gate.
stated_goal: Run the bounded two-row provider-compatible pilot only if provider credentials, runner readiness, cost capture, redaction, and receipt controls are ready.
